summary: An unexpectedly excellent audience (AUD) tape that sounds killer for its era.
review: The reviewer is thrilled with this AUD recording, calling it a "killer" and "thoroughly SLAMMIN" tape, especially given its age. Pitch correction work is praised as spot‑on, turning an otherwise unknown taper’s source into a highly enjoyable listen. No specific comments on the musical performance are provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review but it is overwhelmingly positive about the audio quality; lack of show‑related commentary limits confidence, so rating reflects strong recording with unknown performance.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer describes the AUD tape as "killer" and praises excellent pitch correction; despite being from an unknown taper, the sound is clear and impressive for its time.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific remarks on set structure or performance quality were made.
